heading: Create the MongoDB Vector Search and MongoDB Search Indexes
body:
This section demonstrates how to create the following indexes on the
fields in the `sample_mflix.embedded_movies` collection:

- A MongoDB Vector Search index on the `plot_embedding_voyage_3_large` field for
  running vector queries against that field.

- A MongoDB Search index on the `title` field for running full-text search
  against that field.
